content: We can integrate HyDE's hypothetical generation pipeline into the ICM curiosity mechanism for 2025 autonomous swarm UAV agents, where HyDE generates hypothetical state documents of unvisited environment regions to amplify intrinsic reward for underexplored areas. This hybrid system solves the common ICM problem of asymptotic reward decay in familiar environments by continuously creating structured hypothetical exploration targets that the agent is intrinsically motivated to verify.
